criteria_verification.evidence: Created guardkit/templates/__init__.py and guardkit/templates/resolver.py. The resolve_template_source_dir function has the same signature (template_name: str) -> Optional[Path] and identical behaviour: checks package-installed templates via _get_templates_base_dir() first, falls back to user templates via _get_user_templates_dir(). Verified by 4 unit tests in TestResolveTemplateSourceDir and 2 backward-compatibility tests.
